subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Sustainer of earth and heaven, Subduer of all contingent things, Who encompasseth all created beings, Thou beholdest Thy servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب یا قیوم الارض و السموات و مسخر الممکنات و المحیط بکل الموجودات تری عبادک
